race.comment: Tough finish. SET ME LOOSE (4) resumes having bolted in with her maiden when last seen at Yarra Valley over 1009m, backed right into $1.35 there off a strong debut at Werribee prior. Looks one to follow and can return where she left off. PACIFIC GLAMOUR (8) was okay first up when well supported at Ballarat and should come on plenty from that. She draws for every hope. ROSANGELA (6) resumes. She was racing in some good races last time in and profiles as one who could go on with it this preparation. IN HASTE (1) struggled at her local debut but is much better than that and has been given time, look for a better run.
